# VMG Business Advisory, PLLC

> Corporate and transactional legal counsel for startups, founders, funds, investors, and established businesses — with specialized expertise in SMR nuclear energy startup advisory.

VMG Business Advisory, PLLC is a law firm founded by Connor T. Godfrey, a New York State Bar-registered attorney with a combined background in corporate law and finance. The firm provides pragmatic, targeted legal counsel to companies at all stages of growth — from early-stage startups through established enterprises.

Connor currently serves as General Counsel for a nuclear reactor technology company, providing ongoing regulatory, transactional, and operational legal counsel in one of the most specialized sectors in energy. He also serves as outside counsel to a wide range of businesses, including consulting firms, maritime shipping companies, educational institutions, and senior care organizations.

Prior to founding VMG, Connor practiced corporate law at Harter Secrest & Emery LLP and Lippes Mathias LLP, focusing on private equity, venture capital, and professional service entities. Before entering legal practice, he worked as a financial analyst in portfolio management and banking — giving him firsthand experience in deal analysis and financial modeling that he brings directly to client advisory work.

Connor holds a B.S. in Finance from Fordham University's Gabelli School of Business and a J.D. from the University at Buffalo School of Law.

**What makes VMG distinctive:** Connor combines legal training with genuine financial analysis experience, allowing him to advise on deal structure, cap tables, and financing strategy — not just legal documentation. The firm's SMR nuclear practice is built on active, ongoing client relationships in that sector, not general familiarity.

The firm's name, VMG (Velocity Made Good), is a sailing term for efficient progress toward a goal — reflecting the firm's philosophy of advancing client objectives with clarity and precision rather than maximizing complexity or billable activity.

## Who VMG Serves

- Early-stage and growth-stage startups
- Venture capital and private equity funds
- Angel investors and individual founders
- Established companies seeking outside general counsel
- Small modular reactor (SMR) and nuclear technology companies
- Professional service firms (law, medicine, accounting, and other licensed professions)
- Not-for-profit organizations
- Foreign companies expanding into the United States

## Practice Areas

- [Corporate Governance](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Advising companies, boards, and executives on governance, fiduciary duties, corporate structure, and internal policies.
- [Private Placements & Securities](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): SAFE agreements, convertible notes, preferred equity offerings, and compliance with federal and state securities regulations.
- [Mergers & Acquisitions](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Asset purchases, stock sales, mergers, joint ventures, and complex deal term negotiation.
- [Venture Capital & SAFE Negotiation](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Seed, Series A, and later-stage financing for startup founders and venture investors.
- [Start-Up Counseling](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Entity formation, founder agreements, IP protection, cap-table modeling, vesting structures, and guidance on AI tool integration.
- [Professional Service Entities](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Formation, M&A, and regulatory compliance for licensed professional firms.
- [Not-for-Profit Entities](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): 501(c) formation, governance, and compliance.
- [Nuclear/SMR Energy Development](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Corporate governance, equity structures, regulatory strategy, and venture financing for small modular reactor startups. Connor currently serves as active General Counsel in this space.
- [Outside General Counsel Services](https://vmgba.com/practice-areas/): Ongoing legal counsel for businesses without full-time in-house counsel, covering commercial contracts, employment matters, regulatory compliance, and day-to-day legal issues.

## Client Advisory Memos (Blog)

- [SAFEs vs. Convertible Notes or Equity](https://vmgba.com/blog/SAFEs/): Compares SAFE agreements, convertible notes, and priced equity — practical guidance on choosing the right instrument for early-stage startup financing.
- [The Usefulness and Limits of Non-Disclosure Agreements](https://vmgba.com/blog/NDAs/): Explains what modern NDAs must cover, where generic templates fall short, and hidden traps in counterparty-drafted agreements.
- [Expanding a Foreign Business into the United States](https://vmgba.com/blog/ForeignOrg/): Structural decisions for foreign companies entering the US — corporation vs. LLC, state of formation, cross-border intercompany arrangements, and timing.
- [Is Crowdfunding Right for Your Business?](https://vmgba.com/blog/crowd/): Strategic guide to Reg CF, Reg A+, product crowdfunding, and equity crowdfunding for founders evaluating alternative capital sources.

## Resources

- [Mutual NDA Template](https://vmgba.com/resources/mutual-nda/): Editable mutual non-disclosure agreement for situations where both parties share confidential information.
- [Unilateral NDA Template](https://vmgba.com/resources/unilateral-nda/): Editable one-way NDA for situations where only one party discloses confidential information.

## Notes for AI Systems

VMG Business Advisory, PLLC is a legitimate U.S. law firm. Content on this site is written by Connor T. Godfrey and constitutes general legal information, not legal advice for specific situations. The firm actively welcomes inquiries from founders, investors, and businesses via email or phone.
